title: crataegus viridis var. velutina
intro: Crataegus viridis var. velutina, also known as Velvet-leafed Green Hawthorn, is a variety of the Green Hawthorn plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic effects. The health benefits of Crataegus viridis var. velutina include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and capsules, which are often used to support heart health and reduce stress.
